name: cli-installed-web-supplement
description: User asks about a topic not fully covered by cyoda help — skill must supplement with web docs

input.userMessage: How does Cyoda handle schema version migration when I lock a model and then need to add a field?

expectedBehavior: Runs cyoda help and finds it doesn't fully address schema migration
Fetches supplementary info from the web docs at cyoda-docs-feature-cyoda-go-init.surge.sh
Synthesizes a complete answer combining local help and web docs
Notes that web docs reflect the latest version which may differ from installed version
antiPatterns: Stopping at 'cyoda help doesn't cover this' without fetching web docs
Only returning local help output without synthesis
Claiming no answer exists when web docs cover it
